# MarketplaceKitError.missingAgeRatingExceptionRequest

**Case**

An error that indicates the app needs to request an age-rating exception.

## Declaration

```swift
case missingAgeRatingExceptionRequest
```

## Discussion

The framework throws this error if your app calls [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/AppLibrary/App/presentAgeExceptionApproveInPersonSheet()] when there’s no age-rating exception requests for the app in the [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/AppLibrary/currentAgeExceptionRequests()] list.

## Age-rating errors

- **MarketplaceKitError.ageRatingExceptionNotNeeded**: An error that indicates the app requests an unnecessary age-rating exception.
- **MarketplaceKitError.ratingRestricted**: An error that indicates the requested app’s age rating is beyond that allowed for the device.
